# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

//Internal - If turned ON 128-bit SVE2 vector length is assumed
KLEIDICV_ASSUME_128BIT_SVE2:BOOL=OFF

//Internal - If turned ON Canny algorithm creates bit exact result

//Internal - Enable all KleidiCV operations in the OpenCV HAL.

// show a measurable performance uplift.
KLEIDICV_ENABLE_ALL_OPENCV_HAL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SME2 code paths

//Enable SVE2 code paths
KLEIDICV_ENABLE_SVE2:BOOL=ON

//Internal - Enable experimental Canny algorithm
KLEIDICV_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURE_CANNY:BOOL=OFF

//Limits SME2 code paths to selected algorithms. Has no effect
// if KLEIDICV_ENABLE_SME2 is false.
KLEIDICV_LIMIT_SME2_TO_SELECTED_ALGORITHMS:BOOL=ON

//Limits SVE2 code paths to selected algorithms. Has no effect
// if KLEIDICV_ENABLE_SVE2 is false.
KLEIDICV_LIMIT_SVE2_TO_SELECTED_ALGORITHMS:BOOL=ON

//Internal - If turned ON interleaving loads and stores are preferred
// instead of continuous loads and stores
KLEIDICV_PREFER_INTERLEAVING_LOAD_STORE:BOOL=OFF

KLEIDICV_USE_CV_NAMESPACE_IN_OPENCV_HAL:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a library.
M_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/Users/syedovaisakhtar/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-android/26/libm.so

//Because GCC (as of this writing) and some older versions of Clang
// do not have a full or optimal set of Neon intrinsics, for performance
// reasons, the default when building libjpeg-turbo with those
// compilers is to continue using the older GAS implementation
// of the Neon SIMD extensions for certain algorithms.  Setting
// this option forces the full Neon intrinsics implementation to
// be used with all compilers.  Unsetting this option forces the
// hybrid GAS/intrinsics implementation to be used with all compilers.
NEON_INTRINSICS:BOOL=ON

//Use Orbbec SDK as backend to support more camera models and platforms
// (force to ON on MacOS)
OBSENSOR_USE_ORBBEC_SDK:BOOL=OFF

//Where to create the platform-dependant cvconfig.h
OPENCV_CONFIG_FILE_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/build_android

//Disable environment variables access (getenv)

OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_BINARY_DIR:INTERNAL=/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/build_android/modules/dnn
//The category of the module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_CLASS:INTERNAL=PUBLIC
//Flattened dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_DEPS:INTERNAL=opencv_core;opencv_imgproc
//Extra dependencies of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_DEPS_EXT:INTERNAL=
//Flattened dependencies of opencv_dnn module (for linker)
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_DEPS_TO_LINK:INTERNAL=opencv_core;opencv_imgproc
//Brief description of opencv_dnn module
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_DESCRIPTION:INTERNAL=Deep neural network module. It allows to load models from different frameworks and to make forward pass
//List of header files for opencv_dnn
OPENCV_MODULE_opencv_dnn_HEADERS:INTERNAL=/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/all_layers.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/dict.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/dnn.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/dnn.inl.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/layer.details.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/layer.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/layer_reg.private.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/shape_utils.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/utils/debug_utils.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/utils/inference_engine.hpp;/Users/syedovaisakhtar/AndroidStudioProjects/Panorama/nativecore/src/main/cpp/opencv/modules/dnn/include/opencv2/dnn/version.hpp
